title: Assam HSLC Result 2026 Declared: 65.62% Students Pass, Class 10 Scorecard Download Link Here
description: Assam Board 10th HSLC Result 2026: The Assam SEBA declared the Class 10 HSLC 2026 result on April 10 at 10:30 am for 4, 38, 565 candidates. Students can check the direct link to download their online marksheet here.
